title: Lattice (the canonical lattice.json container)
description: The canonical state the vendored lattice kernel reads and writes at `.agents/dev-factory/lattice.json`. Code reads this; every grid view (the UI, the SQLite index) is DERIVED from it and rebuildable. A `cells` array of Cell records (the vendored harness-forge cell shape: separate layer/scope/slug, the computed cid is identity). Permissive at the top level because the kernel stamps its own bookkeeping (kernel_version, etc.).

kernel_version.description: The vendored lattice kernel version that wrote this file (atomic save stamp).

cells.description: Every cell in the lattice. Each validates against cell.schema.json ($id: Cell).
